message:
fix: add JSONL locking to performIncrementalExport

The incremental export path was missing lock protection, allowing
race conditions between sync export and daemon auto-flush via this path.

This extends the JSONL locking from PR #1279 to cover the incremental
export code path as well.

Co-Authored-By: rsnodgrass <rsnodgrass@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
